title: Log MemoryFileUtils write fallback failures
description: The MemoryFileUtils.write call is wrapped in a broad exception handler that falls back to operation_after_content without logging the failure, which makes debugging issues difficult. Add diagnostic logging while preserving fallback behavior.
close_reason: Logged MemoryFileUtils content-template render failures before falling back to plain content and added regression coverage.

title: 精简 patch merge LLM 输入
description:
减少 patch merge ExtractLoop 的输入 token 数量：
- 移除 rationale、base_version 等无用 metadata
- 移除整个 gradient_metadata
- 简化 patch 标题：Memory Patch N → Patch N
- 移除 target_uri / memory_type / target_name 等冗余 header
- 简化 field diff 格式，去掉 diff 围栏和 ---/+++ header
- diff 上下文从 n=0 改为 n=1，增加定位能力

预估减少约 20% prompt tokens。

修改文件：
- openviking/session/memory/patch_merge_context_provider.py
- tests/session/memory/test_patch_merge_context_provider.py
- tests/session/train/test_train_components.py

title: 简化 streaming trainer chunk 分组逻辑
description:
移除按 training_category 和 target_uri 的两级分组，改为 flat 的按梯度数量切片。因为每个 batch 一起更新，不需要分组。

修改文件：
- openviking/session/train/components/policy_trainer.py
- tests/session/train/test_train_framework.py
- tests/session/train/test_train_components.py

title: 移除 batch runner 的 rollout_backend 概念
description:
rollout_backend 是 benchmark service 内部的实现细节，batch runner 作为客户端不应该知道。
- 从 BatchTrainEvalConfig 移除 rollout_backend 字段
- 从 run_batch_train_eval CLI 移除 --rollout-backend 参数
- RemoteRolloutExecutor 不再发送 rollout_backend option

service 端保留 --rollout-backend 启动参数，batch 训练统一使用 service 配置。

修改文件：
- openviking/session/train/batch_runner.py
- openviking/session/train/run_batch_train_eval.py
